name: Group Retreat Planning
headline: Use Group Retreat Planning for schools, churches, teams, and organizations that need a custom path
idealFor: Best for organizers coordinating larger experiences
description: Group Retreat Planning is the high-trust lane for larger or more complex experiences. It is built for organizers who need logistics, scheduling, and coordination support before a commercial path is finalized.
bullets: Built for schools, churches, and community groups
Qualification-first instead of a one-size-fits-all checkout flow
Supports custom planning and higher-value engagements

qualificationChecks.title: Group size and structure
qualificationChecks.description: Clarify the group makeup, timing, and support needed.

qualificationChecks.title: Experience goals
qualificationChecks.description: Understand whether the retreat is educational, spiritual, team-building, or family/community focused.

qualificationChecks.title: Planning complexity
qualificationChecks.description: Map the logistics before deciding what the final package should look like.

timeline.title: Qualify the retreat
timeline.description: Start with the core goals, group details, and timing considerations.

timeline.title: Shape the custom plan
timeline.description: Use that context to determine the best next step and scope.

timeline.title: Move into a custom engagement
timeline.description: Once the fit is clear, move toward a serious planning or booking path.

proofPoints.title: Qualification-first protects the experience
proofPoints.description: Larger groups need a more thoughtful path than a generic checkout button.

proofPoints.title: A serious group lane raises the credibility of the entire site
proofPoints.description: It shows that Camp Dream GA can support more than casual browsing.

sections.title: Custom coordination
sections.description: Built for groups that need more planning and communication.

sections.title: Clearer fit assessment
sections.description: Prevents organizers from getting pushed into the wrong path.

sections.title: Higher-value opportunities
sections.description: Supports deeper relationships and more custom commercial value.

leadForm.heading: Start a Group Retreat Planning inquiry
leadForm.intro: Share the basics of your group and goals so the right planning conversation can begin.

cta.heading: Use Group Retreat Planning when your experience needs more coordination than a standard package.
cta.body: This lane is built for custom logistics, clearer expectations, and higher-trust planning.
